dublinCore.dc:title: 116 HRES 125 EH: Electing Members to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives and ranking Members on a certain standing committee of the House of Representatives.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Electing Members to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives and ranking Members on a certain standing committee of the House of Representatives.

section.text: That the following named Members be, and are hereby, elected to the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Sires, Mr. Peters, and Mr. Cooper.
Ms. Meng, Ms. Wild, and Mr. Phillips.

section.text: That the following named Member be, and is hereby, ranked as follows on the following standing committee of the House of Representatives:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Mr. Perlmutter (to rank immediately after Mrs. Torres of California).
